landing.heroDesc: Premium platform connecting you with verified professional companions for business meetings, formal dinners, events, and other professional needs.

meeting.title: Meeting Companion
meeting.desc: Professional companion for business meetings, presentations, and negotiations

dinner.title: Dinner Companion
dinner.desc: Elegant partner for formal or casual dinner occasions

event.title: Event Companion
event.desc: Classy plus-one for galas, weddings, or networking events

business.title: Business Assistant
business.desc: Professional secretary for domestic/international business trips

diamond.services: VIP escort, diplomat/CEO companion, international trip

verification.title: Strict Verification
verification.desc: eKYC, background check, interview, mandatory training

matching.title: AI Smart Matching
matching.desc: Matching based on needs, preferences, and compatibility

escrow.title: Escrow Payment
escrow.desc: Funds secured in escrow, released after service completion

safety.title: SOS & Safety
safety.desc: Emergency button, live tracking, 24/7 support team

multilang.title: Multi-language
multilang.desc: Interface & partners available in multiple languages

auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Please sign in to your account.
auth.loginError: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join ARETON.id and discover professional companions.

auth.forgotSuccess: If your email is registered, we've sent you a password reset link.
auth.checkInbox: Please check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been updated. Please sign in with your new password.
auth.resetInvalid: Invalid reset link. Please request a new one.
auth.authLayoutDesc: Exclusive professional companion service for formal events, business trips, and your important occasions.

dashboard.myBookingsDesc: Manage and track your booking status

bookings.selectEscortDesc: Please browse and select an escort from the list.

review.title: Write Review
review.success: Your review has been submitted successfully. Your feedback helps improve service quality.

REFUNDED.title: Refunded

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.settingsDesc: Security and emergency notifications cannot be disabled for your safety. Changes take effect immediately.

safety.verification: All escorts have undergone a rigorous identity verification process including ID validation and background screening.
